//: Token-auth Atlassian MCP server for CI. The official Rovo server (mcp.atlassian.com) uses interactive OAuth, which cannot complete on a headless GitHub Actions runner, so we use the community mcp-atlassian image with Jira API-token auth. Wired into the Claude Code action via `--mcp-config .github/mcp-atlassian.json`. Image tag is pinned; bump deliberately. Runs as a stdio server through Docker (preinstalled on ubuntu-latest). ${VAR} placeholders are expanded by Claude from the action step's env; the bare `-e VAR` args pass those values into the container.
